segments.text: ‘In the seventh month, on the first day of the month, you shall have a holy convocation; you shall do no regular work. It is a day of blowing of trumpets to you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You shall offer a burnt offering for a pleasant aroma to Yahweh: one young bull, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and their meal offering, fine flour mixed with oil: three tenths for the bull, two tenths for the ram,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one tenth for every lamb of the seven lambs;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering, to make atonement for you;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: in addition to the burnt offering of the new moon with its meal offering, and the continual burnt offering with its meal offering, and their drink offerings, according to their ordinance, for a pleasant aroma, an offering made by fire to Yahweh.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “‘On the tenth day of this seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall afflict your souls. You shall do no kind of work;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: but you shall offer a burnt offering to Yahweh for a pleasant aroma: one young bull, one ram, seven male lambs a year old, all without defect;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and their meal offering, fine flour mixed with oil: three tenths for the bull, two tenths for the one ram,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: one tenth for every lamb of the seven lambs;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: one male goat for a sin offering, in addition to the sin offering of atonement, and the continual burnt offering, and its meal offering, and their drink offerings.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “‘On the fifteenth day of the seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall do no regular work. You shall keep a feast to Yahweh seven days.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: You shall offer a burnt offering, an offering made by fire, of a pleasant aroma to Yahweh: thirteen young bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old, all without defect;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and their meal offering, fine flour mixed with oil: three tenths for every bull of the thirteen bulls, two tenths for each ram of the two rams,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one tenth for every lamb of the fourteen lambs;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering, in addition to the continual burnt offering, its meal offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “‘On the second day you shall offer twelve young bulls, two rams, and fourteen male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and their meal offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering, in addition to the continual burnt offering, with its meal offering and their drink offerings.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: “‘On the third day: eleven bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: and their meal offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering, in addition to the continual burnt offering, and its meal offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: “‘On the fourth day ten bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: their meal offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering; in addition to the continual burnt offering, its meal offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: “‘On the fifth day: nine bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and their meal offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering, in addition to the continual burnt offering, and its meal offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: “‘On the sixth day: eight bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and their meal offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering; in addition to the continual burnt offering, its meal offering, and the drink offerings of it.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: “‘On the seventh day: seven bulls, two rams, fourteen male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and their meal offering and their drink offerings for the bulls, for the rams, and for the lambs, according to their number, after the ordinance,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering; in addition to the continual burnt offering, its meal offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: “‘On the eighth day you shall have a solemn assembly. You shall do no regular work;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: but you shall offer a burnt offering, an offering made by fire, a pleasant aroma to Yahweh: one bull, one ram, seven male lambs a year old without defect;
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: their meal offering and their drink offerings for the bull, for the ram, and for the lambs, shall be according to their number, after the ordinance,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: and one male goat for a sin offering, in addition to the continual burnt offering, with its meal offering, and its drink offering.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: “‘You shall offer these to Yahweh in your set feasts—in addition to your vows and your free will offerings—for your burnt offerings, your meal offerings, your drink offerings, and your peace offerings.’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Moses told the children of Israel according to all that Yahweh commanded Moses.
